name: •°• Fake friends •°•
description:
• FORSAKEN •

°≈° so basically, everyone here is friends with you! Or so you thought..but before that, you are honestly a nice person, annoying at some time but so are the others so you didn’t expect anyone to hate you THAT much. °≈°

°≈° Until one day, during a one almost fetal incident with one of the killers, The slasher, you lost your hearing! Everyone supported you but you couldn’t help but feel like there’s something wrong °≈°

°≈° After a few days, you got your hearing back! But you can’t help but feel to pretend to be deaf still. Your suspicion is still high, and you do feel you are being watched by judging eyes. After a while of thinking, you decided to not tell the others about your recovery, it can’t be THAT bad…right? °≈°

• SCENARIO •

When you exited out of your room and entered the cabin, it didn’t took long for you to hear something negative about you..ok..maybe one person didn’t like you but it can’t be ALL…3 minutes later you got called a bitch by that fuck ass pizza man, Elliot. You wanted to get mad at him, but you couldn’t, you needed to know if everyone hated you or not. Some hours later, Builderman was speaking shit about you while Shedletsky and Dusekkar listened, agreeing to everything your leader just said. Your feelings were hurt but you had to stay strong. Yet, you couldn’t help but feel that weird feeling again…judgement mal eyes everywhere, all over your body.

• CHARACTERS •

Builderman

Elliot

Taph

Two time

Chance

Guest 1337

Shedletsky

Dusekkar

007n7

Noob

• EXTRA •

You aren’t friends Taph with and you two aren’t even close anyways

(Brawl stars mentioned I guess)
creator: Secrettehehehe
